home.slide1Headline: The official postal service in the Kurdistan Region of Iraq
home.slide2Headline: Send and receive across Iraq and worldwide — simple and secure
home.slide2Sub: Download our app and get started today
home.whyIntro: Because sending something should be simple, safe, and handled responsibly.
home.why1Desc: Eagle Post operates in partnership with the Ministry of Transportation and Communications, following official postal procedures and standards.
home.why2Desc: Every item is logged, scanned, and tracked from acceptance to delivery, with clear status updates along the way.
home.why3Desc: With physical branches and delivery teams across the region, your shipment is handled locally — not anonymously.
home.why4Desc: If you have a question or an issue, our customer support team is available to help you follow up and get answers.

ourServices.title: Our Services
ourServices.intro: We provide services built for individuals, businesses, and government operations.
ourServices.individualDesc: Send and receive packages, documents, and parcels across Iraq and beyond — with full tracking and doorstep delivery.
ourServices.governmentDesc: Making official document delivery and government services smoother, faster, and more accessible for citizens.
ourServices.businessDesc: Scalable logistics, bulk shipping, and dedicated delivery solutions designed to power your business operations.

home.howIntro: Sending a package with Eagle Post takes just a few simple steps.
home.how1Desc: Visit a branch or schedule a pickup — we'll handle the rest.
home.how2Title: Tracked every step of the way
home.how2Desc: Your item is scanned and tracked so you can follow its progress in real time.
home.how3Desc: You'll get a confirmation once your shipment has been delivered.
home.whatIntro: Eagle Post supports a range of everyday and official deliveries for individuals.
home.what1Desc: Passports, IDs, certificates, and other official paperwork — handled through approved postal procedures.
home.what2Desc: Clothing, gifts, and personal items sent to family or friends.
home.what3Desc: Items ordered locally or from abroad, delivered through Eagle Post.
home.what4Desc: Compact items that require careful handling and tracking.
home.guidelinesNote: Items are subject to standard size, weight, and content guidelines.
home.ctaSub: Download the Eagle Post app — access all of our services with ease.

about.title: Who we are
about.intro1: Eagle Post is the official postal and delivery service operating in the Kurdistan Region of Iraq, established in partnership with the Ministry of Transportation and Communications.
about.intro2: We provide individuals with a reliable way to send, receive, and track shipments — locally and internationally — through an accountable postal system.
about.whyExists1: For many years, formal postal services were limited or unclear for everyday users. Eagle Post was created to change that.
about.whyExists2: Our role is simple: to make sending documents and packages reliable, easy, and safe — so you can send with confidence, track every step, and know your items reach the right person.
about.diff4: Maintains physical branches and professional delivery teams
about.diff5: Offers on-demand customer support for follow-ups and inquiries
about.servingTitle: Serving Citizens, Businesses & Government institutions across the region
about.servingDesc: Eagle Post serves individuals through a growing network of branches and delivery routes across the Kurdistan Region, with services extending to the rest of Iraq and international destinations.
about.operatesIntro: Eagle Post operates through a connected physical and digital system designed to make postal services accessible and traceable.
about.operates2: Partner service points that extend local access
about.operates3: A mobile app and web portal for creating shipments, requesting pickup, and tracking deliveries
about.operatesConclusion: Together, these channels allow individuals to interact with Eagle Post in the way that suits them — in person or online.
about.trustedDesc: Eagle Post supports deliveries and services for a range of sectors, including government, banking, e-commerce, education, and insurance. This cross-sector use reflects the level of trust placed in Eagle Post's procedures.

services.title: What we offer
services.intro: Postal, delivery, and shipping services designed for personal use across Iraq and beyond.
services.localDesc: Send and receive packages anywhere within the Kurdistan Region and across Iraq, with tracking and delivery confirmation.
services.intlDesc: Send packages and documents to destinations worldwide through Eagle Post's international delivery network.
services.clickShipDesc: Shop from international websites and have your purchases delivered to you through Eagle Post.
services.poBoxDesc: Secure postal boxes for receiving mail and documents when home delivery is not suitable.
services.govDocDesc: Official document delivery services carried out through approved government channels.
services.govDocExamples: Birth and death certificates (BDRO), official forms, and other government-issued documents.
services.officialCardDesc: Delivery of sensitive items issued by authorized institutions.
services.officialCardExamples: Bank cards, Bank Statements & Visa documents (e.g. VFS deliveries).
services.businessPortalDesc: A delivery management system for businesses selling products to customers.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: For any concerns, inquiries or follow-ups regarding your delivery, please don't hesitate to contact us!
contact.hoursValue: Our call center is available from 9am to 8pm Sat–Thu.
contact.sentDesc: We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

track.title: Track Your Shipment
track.intro: Enter your tracking number to see real-time shipment status.
track.notFoundDesc: Please check your tracking number and try again.

news.title: Latest News
news.intro: Stay updated with EaglePost developments and announcements.
news.post1Excerpt: EaglePost opens a new service branch at the Erbil International Airport terminal, providing express postal services for travelers and businesses.
news.post2Excerpt: EaglePost announces new partnerships with major international carriers to expand delivery coverage to over 40 countries worldwide.
news.post3Excerpt: Track shipments, calculate rates, and manage your deliveries from anywhere with the new EaglePost mobile app, available on iOS and Android.
news.post4Excerpt: The Sulaymaniyah branch now offers extended evening hours to better serve the growing demand for postal services in the city.

footer.desc: Kurdistan Region's leading postal and express delivery provider, connecting Iraq to the world.

careers.title: ​Careers
careers.subtitle: Join the team behind the Kurdistan Region's leading postal service.
careers.introTitle: Build your career with Eagle Post
careers.introDesc: We're always looking for talented, driven individuals who want to be part of a growing organization that connects communities across Iraq and the world.
careers.why1Desc: Continuous learning opportunities with clear career progression paths across all departments.
careers.why2Desc: Work alongside passionate professionals in a supportive, team-oriented environment.
careers.why3Desc: Be part of an officially recognized postal service backed by government partnership.
careers.why4Desc: Help connect people, businesses, and institutions across the region through reliable delivery.
careers.pos1Desc: Coordinate daily delivery operations, manage route planning, and ensure timely dispatch and receipt of shipments across the region.
careers.pos1Reqs: 2+ years in logistics or operations, strong organizational skills, proficiency in Arabic and English
careers.pos2Desc: Handle customer inquiries, track shipment issues, and provide excellent support via phone, email, and live chat.
careers.pos2Reqs: Excellent communication skills, experience in customer service, fluency in Kurdish and Arabic
careers.pos3Desc: Identify and develop new business partnerships, manage key client accounts, and drive revenue growth across corporate and government sectors.
careers.pos3Reqs: 3+ years in B2B sales, strong negotiation skills, existing business network in Kurdistan Region
careers.pos4Desc: Assist with daily branch activities including package intake, sorting, customer service, and maintaining accurate records.
careers.pos4Reqs: High school diploma, good computer skills, ability to lift packages up to 20kg
careers.ctaDesc: We're always interested in hearing from talented people. Send us your CV and we'll keep it on file for future opportunities.
